note: Fully regular. Attributive stem = lemma (nett -> nette, netten). Baseline control case.
Regular, but included to show comparative/superlative storage (regular here; engine could derive, stored for review).
Irregular comparison (gut -> besser -> best) — suppletive, cannot be derived. Positive attributive is regular (gute). Tests comparison overrides.
Superlative is größt, NOT großst (ß-spelling rule). Comparison must be stored, not derived by naive +st.
Predicative form is 'hoch', but attributive stem is 'hoh' (das hohe Haus, not das hoche Haus). The attributive stem differs from the lemma — a field most schemas forget.
Attributive drops the -e- of the stem (teuer -> teure, not teuere). Another lemma != attributive-stem case.
